original_query: select s_acctbal, s_name, n_name, p_partkey, p_mfgr, s_address, s_phone, s_comment from part, supplier, partsupp, nation, region where p_partkey = ps_partkey and s_suppkey = ps_suppkey and p_size = 3 and p_type like '%NICKEL' and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_regionkey = r_regionkey and r_name = 'AMERICA' and ps_supplycost = ( select min(ps_supplycost) from partsupp, supplier, nation, region where p_partkey = ps_partkey and s_suppkey = ps_suppkey and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_regionkey = r_regionkey and r_name = 'AMERICA' ) order by s_acctbal desc, n_name, s_name, p_partkey limit 100;
rewritten_query:
WITH min_supply AS (
    SELECT ps_partkey, MIN(ps_supplycost) AS min_supplycost
    FROM partsupp
    JOIN supplier ON partsupp.ps_suppkey = supplier.s_suppkey
    JOIN nation ON supplier.s_nationkey = nation.n_nationkey
    JOIN region ON nation.n_regionkey = region.r_regionkey
    WHERE region.r_name = 'AMERICA'
    GROUP BY ps_partkey
)
SELECT s_acctbal, s_name, n_name, p_partkey, p_mfgr, s_address, s_phone, s_comment
FROM part
JOIN min_supply ON part.p_partkey = min_supply.ps_partkey
JOIN partsupp ON part.p_partkey = partsupp.ps_partkey AND partsupp.ps_supplycost = min_supply.min_supplycost
JOIN supplier ON partsupp.ps_suppkey = supplier.s_suppkey
JOIN nation ON supplier.s_nationkey = nation.n_nationkey
JOIN region ON nation.n_regionkey = region.r_regionkey
WHERE part.p_size = 3
AND part.p_type LIKE '%NICKEL'
ORDER BY s_acctbal DESC, n_name, s_name, p_partkey
LIMIT 100;

rewrite_suggestion.produced_suggestion: Replace the correlated subquery with a CTE to calculate minimum supply costs once instead of for each row
Convert implicit joins in the WHERE clause to explicit JOIN syntax for better readability and potentially better optimization
